definition.goldenPassRule: A demo can only be golden-pass when browser QA exercises the governed local/browser or app-owned model path with real tool use, host-owned state/actions, and required telemetry/audit evidence. Basic/search-only fallback alone cannot pass.

goldenDemos.cascadeRuntimeOnboarding: partial: fallback labeled Basic mode but no visible later capability switch
goldenDemos.realWorkflowCompletion: fail: approval/add-to-cart workflow not exercised in live QA
goldenDemos.approvalAuditTelemetry: not-verified: no approval/audit path surfaced in Basic mode
goldenDemos.nextGate: Provide real local-model browser QA or deterministic model-backed demo path that exercises approval-gated cart mutation.

goldenDemos.localBrowserToolUse: pass: deterministic local/browser model harness calls searchAccounts, evaluateAdminChange, requestAdminApproval, and executeApprovedAdminChange in real Chrome
goldenDemos.cascadeRuntimeOnboarding: pass: browser proof shows local/browser account search and policy evaluation before approval-gated mutation
goldenDemos.basicFallbackHonesty: pass/not-primary: Basic/search-only fallback is explicitly not counted as success
goldenDemos.realWorkflowCompletion: pass: approved Business to Enterprise plan change completed through the app-owned admin mutation route
goldenDemos.hostOwnedMutationPath: pass: /api/edgekit/admin-workflow requires x-edgekit-app-authority, local search proof, and approved approval record before mutation
goldenDemos.approvalAuditTelemetry: pass: browser QA evidence records approval, mutation-started, mutation-completed audit entries plus telemetry
goldenDemos.groundingRefusal: not-applicable: app-owned account state and policy workflow, no open-domain claims
goldenDemos.latestEvidence: qa-artifacts/2026-05-30/admin-workflow/report.md; clean integrated main retest at 90691f0 passed deterministic local/browser model harness exercising RBAC, approval, app-owned mutation, audit, and telemetry in real Chrome after PR #12 merge.
goldenDemos.nextGate: Golden-pass maintained on integrated main; continue regression coverage with scripts/check-admin-workflow-demo.mjs and scripts/run-admin-workflow-browser-qa.mjs before future changes.

goldenDemos.localBrowserToolUse: not-verified: QA browser lacked window.ai.languageModel; Basic retrieval path tested
goldenDemos.cascadeRuntimeOnboarding: partial: Basic fallback labeled but no visible later capability switch
goldenDemos.basicFallbackHonesty: partial: fallback labeled, but unsupported claim laundering was observed on live URL
goldenDemos.realWorkflowCompletion: partial: supported docs Q&A worked; unsupported-claim refusal failed in live QA
goldenDemos.groundingRefusal: fail on live URL: Ohio/robots/rockets prompt returned unrelated snippets
goldenDemos.nextGate: Deploy/retest Basic fallback refusal fix; if generalized, route through claim-support primitive instead of keyword denylist.

goldenDemos.localBrowserToolUse: not-verified in clean browser QA: window.ai.languageModel unavailable and Chrome AI/WebLLM providers reported unavailable; runtime tests cover local-ready controller behavior
goldenDemos.cascadeRuntimeOnboarding: pass/partial: capability mode card and cascade wizard visible; QA browser settled at fallback-ready because local-model capability was missing
goldenDemos.basicFallbackHonesty: pass: Basic mode and no-model fallback are labeled as degraded fallback, not the product path
goldenDemos.realWorkflowCompletion: partial: grounded public-site Q&A and unsupported-claim refusal passed in browser fallback; no mutation workflow expected
goldenDemos.approvalAuditTelemetry: partial: UI telemetry hook is wired; browser QA verified no JS errors but did not exercise a real local-model tool-call telemetry path
goldenDemos.groundingRefusal: pass in browser fallback: Ohio/robots/rockets prompt returned no-evidence refusal
goldenDemos.latestEvidence: demos/public-site-agent-user/README.md#browser-qa-evidence; clean worktree feat/public-site-agent-user browser QA on http://127.0.0.1:5173/
goldenDemos.nextGate: Retest in a known local-model browser or add an accepted deterministic local-browser model QA lane before promotion beyond blocked-by-env.

goldenDemos.localBrowserToolUse: pass: browser-facing local step shown before app-owned handoff
goldenDemos.cascadeRuntimeOnboarding: pass: browser-first cascade visible before handoff
goldenDemos.basicFallbackHonesty: pass/not-primary: success path is local/browser to app-owned worker, not Basic fallback
goldenDemos.realWorkflowCompletion: pass in local/browser demo proof: bounded app task escalates to app-owned worker route
goldenDemos.hostOwnedMutationPath: pass: server action requires explicit app-owned authority
goldenDemos.approvalAuditTelemetry: pass: telemetry/audit show local step, handoff, worker result
goldenDemos.latestEvidence: qa-artifacts/2026-05-29/local-browser-model-lane/report.md; deterministic local/browser model harness exercised worker-handoff in real Chrome; PR kevinmarmstrong/edgekit-demos#5 remains pending review/merge
goldenDemos.nextGate: Review/merge PR #5 or isolate this QA-lane diff, then retest from a clean integrated branch before any golden-pass promotion.

labs.nextGate: Review reusable core cascade helper and retest demos against published package when available.
Integrate demo branch; review core issues #2/#3 before claiming product primitive maturity.
